title: <div>Instead of a random &quotbanger word,&quot this button becomes a tool for r
content:
Instead of a random "banger word," this button becomes a tool for rediscovering your own forgotten ideas. It would intelligently surface old notes that are sparsely linked or haven't been viewed in a long time, helping you combat knowledge decay and spark new connections.
Generative Art Becomes a "Mind Map"
The ASCII art generator would be re-purposed to create a visual representation of the current note's place within your knowledge graph. It wouldn't be an image of the topic itself, but a conceptual "constellation" or a minimalist mind map showing the direct and indirect links to other notes, helping you visualize the context of your ideas.
New User Experience & Interface
Split View: The interface would likely be a two-pane view. On the left, your primary note editor. On the right, the AI's "Synapse Panel," which would offer suggested links, show the visual "constellation" map, and display the dynamic synthesis pages when you explore new terms.
Proactive Assistant: As you type a new note, the AI would proactively and non-intrusively highlight words or phrases that could be linked to existing notes, allowing you to build your knowledge web in real-time.
context: From document: This application, "Infinite Wiki," is a dynamic, AI-powered hypertext… — chunk 6 (chunk 6/11)
